mano_cua.result_summary: 任务要求修改nuxt.config.js将head从属性改为方法形式，但浏览器内无文件编辑入口。mano-cua观察到页面标题'Google Fonts'及'Roboto'和'Mulish'文字正常显示，但无法在浏览器内完成配置文件修改操作
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The target functionality - a browser-based interface to edit nuxt.config.js and configure google-fonts module - is not available in the current browser environment. The only browser-based tools available are: localhost:3000 - The Nuxt app itself, OpenClaw Control - An AI chat interface, Nuxt DevTools - Disconnected from server. None provide the ability to edit project configuration files through the browser.
